subcodes.first_line: This is the day whereon the effulgent rays of the Sun of Manifestation have encompassed all, and the Lord of Names hath summoned all unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که اشراق شمس ظهور کل را احاطه فرموده و مالک اسما جمیع را بافق
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
